# FetchIconOptions.HttpClient property

An explicit `HttpClient` to fetch with. When set, it is used as-is and never disposed by the SDK; the caller is responsible for configuring it to not follow redirects automatically (so the cross-origin / scheme-change gate can run on each hop).

```csharp
public HttpClient? HttpClient { get; set; }
```
